mapper.select: SELECT ALARMNO, SYSNAME, EQUIPTYPE, ALARMTIME, RECEIVETIME, ALARMLOC, ALARMMSG, ALARMLEVEL, CLEARTIME FROM RCA.TB_ALARM_CUR_MST WHERE ALARMLOC = #{url} AND CLEARTIME IS NULL ORDER BY ALARMLEVEL DESC LIMIT 1
SELECT POLICY_ID, WR_FAULT_AVG, MI_FAULT_AVG, MJ_FAULT_AVG, CR_FAULT_AVG FROM RESOURCE.TB_PING_POLICY
